title.en: But can Ye Tian be able to block the blood-devo...

content.en:
The Bloodthirsty Wood Spear will devour the power of the Black Pupil Holy Son's bloodline, causing his bloodline to weaken, which is more serious than physical weakness, and is a sequelae that directly affects his potential.

Unless he used a special ancestral medicine that was specifically designed to restore his potential, and it would be a long time before it was possible to restore the power of his bloodline.

It can be said that if he can't kill Ye Tian one after another, if he can't kill Ye Tian, it will be a big loss, and even he himself will fall.

But can Ye Tian be able to block the blood-devouring spear?

"Absolutely unstoppable, even if his strength increases several times or even more than ten times, he can't stop it!"

The Black Pupil Son is full of confidence.

The Gifted of the Returning Realm will never be able to stop the Blood-Devouring Wooden Spear, and the Blood-Devouring Wooden Spear can kill any Saint-Endowed of the Returning Realm.

"Ten Thousand Laws Holy Son, be careful!"

When the light-clothed saint saw the blood-devouring wooden spear, her face changed drastically, and she hurriedly reminded.

Ye Tian also saw the blood-devouring wooden spear, and also felt the danger of death.

With his own words alone, even if there is a holy object like Jin Chenjia, coupled with the holy armor holy skill, he can't stop it.

"You must use the Forbidden Yuan Blade!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

"Die!"

The Black Pupil Holy Son killed Ye Tian, and the Blood-Devouring Wood Spear locked on Ye Tian, no matter how fast Ye Tian was, it was difficult to get rid of the lock of the Blood-Devouring Wood Spear.

Just after the blood-devouring wooden spear of the Black Pupil Holy Son was about to stab Ye Tian, Ye Tian took out the forbidden yuan blade.

In an instant, Ye Tian urged the Forbidden Yuan Blade, and his aura immediately soared to a level comparable to that of a weaker to strongest domain ancestor.

If it is divided by overlimiters, Ye Tian's combat power has soared to the level of fourfold overlimiters at this moment.

"Holy Technique—Extreme!"

The Extreme Holy Skill can greatly increase its own strength, and it can break through defenses, and the power is very terrifying.

Even if this holy technique had only reached the realm of Dacheng, it was able to perfectly match with the Forbidden Yuan Blade and burst out with terrifying combat power.

Break!

Ye Tian held the Forbidden Yuan Blade in his hand and slashed at the blood-devouring wooden spear of the Black Pupil Holy Son.

Bang!!!!

The Forbidden Yuan Blade collided with the Bloodthirsty Wood Spear, and the two flew upside down.

At the same time, the shockwave directly shook the surrounding Saints away.

Distance.

The light-clothed saintess recognized the Forbidden Yuan Blade.

"Is this the Forbidden Yuan Blade? The Holy Son of Ten Thousand Laws actually used the Forbidden Yuan Blade!!"

The light-clothed saint was shocked.

The holy object of the Forbidden Yuan Blade is incomparably weak, but it is also a real life-saving thing, and the increase in strength is very huge.

The sequelae of the Forbidden Yuan Blade far surpass that of the Blooddevouring Wood Spear, and although the Bloodthirsty Wood Spear affects the foundation, it can at least be recovered with ancestral medicine.

And if you use the Forbidden Yuan Blade, the sequelae will be great, not only will it be irreparable, but once it takes a long time, it will kill you directly.

Because of this, geniuses almost did not dare to use the Forbidden Yuan Blade, otherwise it would be more painful than death!

Even if a holy object like the Forbidden Yuan Blade was given to her, she wouldn't dare to use it even if she died!

"Ten Thousand Laws Holy Son, this is too impulsive!"

The light-clothed saint sighed.

However, in that case, if you don't cast the Forbidden Yuan Blade, I'm afraid you will definitely die.

She didn't know if Ye Tian was doing the right thing, but if it was her, she didn't have the courage.

--------------

"Forbidden Yuan Blade, you are ruthless enough!"

The Black Pupil Holy Son was also stunned, the other party dared to use the Forbidden Yuan Blade, even more ruthless than him!

However, the Black Pupil Holy Son still did not give up, and poured the power of the bloodline into the blood-devouring wooden spear, and instantly broke out a terrifying blow.

Rumble!!!!

The blood-devouring wood spear shook Ye Tian back with a single blow, and the power of this blow broke Ye Tian's defense, and a trace of power passed through the forbidden yuan blade, infiltrating and spreading into Ye Tian's body.

"Hahaha, you're dead!"

The Black Pupil Holy Son said.

However, he was also uncomfortable, he was directly hit hard by Ye Tian's forbidden yuan blade, his body continued to crack, and a large number of life-saving things were exhausted one by one.

But he was waiting for Ye Tian to fall, once Ye Tian fell, it would be worth it.

However, he was disappointed!

Although Ye Tian's body was cracking, at this time he performed another holy technique - immortality!

"The Holy Skill is immortal, recover!"

The power of the Holy Technique flowed all over the body, quickly repairing Ye Tian's injuries, and even the power of the Blood-Devouring Wooden Spear was suppressed by the power of the Holy Technique, and it couldn't help Ye Tian at all.

"The holy technique is immortal, you have even practiced this holy skill, impossible, how can you have so many holy skills!!!"

The Black Pupil Son was incredulous.

"Die!"

Ye Tian didn't give up the opportunity, and used the Aurora Holy Technique to instantly approach the Black Pupil Holy Son, holding the Forbidden Yuan Blade, and slashed it with one blow.

Bang!

The blood-devouring wooden spear in the hands of the Black Pupil Holy Son was shattered and completely scrapped, after all, the blow just now had exhausted most of his bloodline, and also exhausted the power of the blood-devouring wooden spear, and now the blood-devouring wooden spear was just a waste product, where could it withstand the blow of the forbidden blade.

The blood-devouring wooden spear was scrapped, and the Black Pupil Holy Son could no longer resist the blow of the Forbidden Yuan Blade, and the vitality of his body was completely annihilated.

The Black Pupil Holy Son, has fallen!

As soon as the Black Pupil Holy Son died, Ye Tian put away the treasures on his body.

Seeing the fall of the Black Pupil Holy Son, the other Holy Endowments were stunned and fled desperately one by one.

Ye Tian was not ready to let them go, and used the Aurora Holy Technique, caught up with one of the Holy Endowments, and easily killed the opponent with one blade.

Just as he was about to catch up with another Saint Gift, the aftermath of the Forbidden Yuan Blade was about to strike.

He didn't dare to use it again, otherwise this replica body would not be able to support it, and wouldn't the treasures on his body be cheap for others?

As a result, Ye Tian immediately broke the connection between the Forbidden Yuan Blades and stopped using the Forbidden Yuan Blade.

At the same time, he swallowed a large amount of holy medicine and used holy skills to immortalize and recover from his injuries as soon as possible.

After a while, Ye Tian's injuries recovered, but the foundation of this replica body was completely destroyed.

"Ten Thousand Laws Holy Son, are you alright?"

The light-clothed saint flew over and asked.

"It's fine!"

Ye Tian said lightly, there was no expression of frustration on his face, which made the light-clothed saint very surprised.

After all, the foundation is scrapped, and it is almost difficult to be promoted to a higher level in the future, and it is shocking that Ye Tian is still so calm.

She didn't ask about Ye Tian's situation, for fear of irritating Ye Tian.

"Thank you for saving your life, the Son of Ten Thousand Laws!" thanked the lightly-robed Saintess.

"It's nothing, I didn't actually save you, and the Holy Giver of the Dark Destruction Domain saw me, and it was impossible to let me go. Even if I don't come to save you, they will send someone to hunt me down!" Ye Tian said lightly.

The two chatted for a few words and then separated.

Ye Tian flew to another uninhabited forest, and then began to sort out his harvest here.

Especially the treasures contained in the corpses of those saints, he had great expectations.
